measurement_note: Size is R, the number of Employees rows, supplied in descending identifier order. The required query projects each bonus and sorts in O(R log R) time. A correct correlated query that performs a full-table prefix count for every employee completes all tiers and fails only by O(R^2) scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: calculate and order 64 employee bonuses
benchmark: calculate and order 256 employee bonuses
benchmark: calculate and order 1024 employee bonuses
